seoTitle: How to Create a Ticket in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to create a new support ticket in Freshdesk, whether you're an agent logging a request or a customer submitting one.
intro: Creating a ticket is the starting point for every support conversation in Freshdesk. This guide walks through the steps to log a new ticket with the details your team needs to resolve it.

steps.heading: Open the new ticket screen
steps.body: From your Freshdesk dashboard, click the option to create a new ticket.

steps.heading: Fill in requester and subject details
steps.body: Enter the customer's contact information and a clear subject line summarizing the issue.

steps.heading: Add a description and priority
steps.body: Describe the issue in detail and set an appropriate priority level so it gets handled in the right order.

steps.heading: Assign and save the ticket
steps.body: Assign the ticket to the right agent or group if known, then save to add it to the queue.

faq.question: Can customers create tickets themselves?
faq.answer: Yes, customers can submit tickets through the support portal, email, or other connected channels.

faq.question: What information is required to create a ticket?
faq.answer: At minimum you'll need a subject and description, along with the requester's contact details.

faq.question: Can I create a ticket on behalf of a customer?
faq.answer: Yes, agents can log tickets manually on a customer's behalf, such as after a phone call.

faq.question: Can I attach files when creating a ticket?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk allows attachments to be added when creating or replying to a ticket.
